name: Mushroom-Filled Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut a thin slice off the top of each tomato. Scoop out pulp, leaving about half an inch shell.
2. Invert tomatoes on paper towels to drain.
3. Chop pulp, reserving 1 cup.
4. In a skillet, sauté mushrooms in 2 tablespoons butter until tender.
5. Combine egg yolks and sour cream; add to mushrooms.
6. Stir in 1/4 cup bread crumbs, salt, thyme, pepper, and reserved tomato pulp.
7. Simmer, uncovered, until thickened, about 1 minute.
8. Spoon about 1/3 cup into each tomato.
9. Place in an ungreased baking dish (11" x 7" x 2 inches).
10. Melt remaining butter; toss with remaining bread crumbs.
11. Sprinkle over tomatoes.
12. Bake, uncovered, at 350°F for 30-35 minutes or until heated through.
